name: section_subtitle
label: Section Subtitle
default: These evidence-based strategies have helped thousands of Californians break free from nicotine addiction.

default.title: Tell Your Story
default.description: Share your decision with people you trust. Having support is crucial during this journey.

default.title: Set a Quit Date
default.description: Pick a specific day within the next two weeks and mark it on your calendar. Make it real.

default.title: Manage Triggers
default.description: Identify what drives your cravings and plan alternatives. Remove temptation from your environment.

default.title: Get Professional Support
default.description: Call our free helpline or chat with a Quit Coach. You're 3x more likely to succeed with help.
